name: Herbed Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cover the green beans with water and cook until crisp-tender.
2. While the green beans are cooking, heat butter in a skillet. Sauté onion until tender.
3. Add lemon juice, parsley, salt (if desired), thyme, and paprika to the sautéed onions.
4. Drain the cooked green beans and add them to the herb mixture.
5. Stir to coat the green beans with the herb butter.
6. Serve immediately.
